channel.title: Mini Diarium Blog
channel.description: Static articles about encrypted offline journaling and local-first software.

item.title: Local-First Journaling Means You Keep the Exit Door Open
item.description: Local-first journaling is not only about privacy. It is also about durability, portability, and keeping your encrypted journal exportable when your tooling changes.

item.title: Why an Offline Journal Is Different From a Cloud Notes App
item.description: An encrypted offline journal changes who controls your writing, your risk surface, and your long-term ownership. Privacy-first journaling starts with architecture.

item.title: Why Mini Diarium Exists
item.description: Mini Diarium exists because private journaling software needed a maintained Mini Diary successor, rebuilt as an encrypted offline journal with a modern stack.
